scenes.text: Ideas are worthless. Execution is everything.

Everybody has a million-dollar idea. Most people have had dozens. The difference between a dreamer and a millionaire is not the quality of the
idea. It is the quality of the execution. While dreamers polish their plans, executors are already on version three, learning from real feedback.

Speed of implementation is your biggest competitive advantage. The person who ships
first learns first. And the person who learns first wins first.

Done is better than perfect. Shipped is
better than sitting in your notes app.

What idea have you been sitting on? Ship
it this week. Follow for execution mindset.
